headline: KLA Corporation (KLAC) Is One Of Jim Cramer’s Top Performing 2026 Stocks
summary: We recently published Jim Cramer’s Biggest Winners to Buy: Top 20 AI & Other Stocks He Got Right in 2026. KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) is one of the stocks discussed by Jim Cramer.
